insights.label: TransLink WC investment (CAD)
insights.detail: Funds ~600 extra bus trips per day and enhanced SkyTrain headways across Metro Vancouver

insights.label: Projected WC boardings, TTC Toronto
insights.detail: Largest sports-transit mobilisation for the city since the 2015 Pan Am Games

insights.label: NJ Transit Secaucus VIP package
insights.detail: vs. $25 standard roundtrip -- 8.8 hours at NYC's $17/hr minimum wage just to reach the stadium

insights.label: Mexico City Metro base fare (USD)
insights.detail: Cheapest stadium access of all 6 cities -- less than a single MTA swipe in New York

insights.label: MetLife strain index -- the Final
insights.detail: July 19 is the single highest-strain transit event in this dataset. One rail corridor, 82,500 fans.

insights.label: Vancouver transit mode share
insights.detail: BC Place is a 2-minute walk from Stadium-Chinatown SkyTrain -- best stadium-transit integration in North America

insights.label: Transit with match ticket in Vancouver
insights.detail: Mirrors Qatar 2022 policy. TransLink bundles all-zone SkyTrain and bus access into every FIFA match ticket.

insights.label: Atlanta stadium trip as % of local min wage
insights.detail: MARTA $5 roundtrip = 69% of Georgia's $7.25 minimum hourly wage -- highest affordability burden of the US cities

insights.label: Estadio Azteca capacity
insights.detail: Largest venue in the tournament. 60% of attendees expected to arrive via Metro Line 2 direct from the city.

insights.label: MetLife Stadium hosts -- tied for most
insights.detail: 5 group stage + Round of 32 + Round of 16 + the Final on July 19. Tied with Atlanta, which hosts the Semifinal.
